---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Anvil Organizer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Which game(s) does this affect?**
All games, or specific ones (e.g. Skyrim SE, BG3).

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g. how MO2/Vortex handles this).
